title: pilosella auriculina
intro: Pilosella auriculina, also known as the Woolly Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella auriculina include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pilosella auriculina can be found in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
